GM:(0,0,0)  L:(1/2,-1/2,-1/2)  T:(1,0,0)  Y:(0,1,0)  Z:(0,0,1)
GM:(0,0,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  Z:(0,0,1)  Y:(0,1,0)  T:(1,0,0)
GM1  GM2  GM4  GM3  GM5  L1  L2L2  (T)Z1  (T)Z2  (T)Z4  (T)Z3  (T)Z5  Y1  Y2  Y4  Y3  Y5  (Z)T1  (Z)T2  (Z)T4  (Z)T3  (Z)T5
